narrative: US-Iran peace deal prospects drive a sharp unwind of geopolitical risk premiums, sending Brent below $100 and WTI toward $91.00. DXY retreats below 98.00 as risk-premium demand eases; USD/JPY falls to 156.25 despite a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage. Gold higher +2.95% near $4,703; equities +0.81%; DXY -0.62%; VIX 16.4. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision on May 27 for NZD directional follow-through.
